ai_profile:
**Bospop 2026 Festival Profile**  

Taking place from July 10–12, 2026, Bospop promises a vibrant celebration of music, bringing together 39 artists from diverse genres and backgrounds. With a lineup rooted in rock, featuring 15 rock acts alongside blues rock, alternative rock, and indie rock, the festival offers a solid foundation of guitar-driven sounds. However, the diversity doesn’t stop there, as attendees can also look forward to an eclectic mix of styles, including soul, funk, symphonic metal, electronic, and even comedy rock. This genre-spanning selection ensures something for every musical taste.  

The festival’s roster showcases international talent, with artists hailing from the USA, Netherlands, the UK, Belgium, Canada, and beyond. While the majority of performers are male, Bospop also embraces a range of voices, including female, mixed-gender, and diverse identities. Additionally, the festival incorporates a variety of cultural perspectives, with 10% of the lineup featuring artists of color.  

Bospop 2026 has been highly rated by audiences, with an average score of 8.16 out of 10 based on 31 rated acts. While not all artists have Spotify links, 82% do, offering fans plenty of opportunities to explore their music ahead of the event. With its broad lineup and impressive ratings, Bospop 2026 is set to be a standout weekend for music enthusiasts.
